mission.title: opentelemetry-operator: Support DotNet auto-instrumentation
mission.description:
This PR adds a support for auto-instrumentation of the  .Net applications. 
Currently, dot net auto-instrumentation image is using the release [opentelemetry-dotnet-instrumentation v0.2.0-beta.1](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-dotnet-instrumentation/releases/tag/v0.2.0-beta.1).

Following environment variables are injected to the application container to enable the auto-instrumentation.

```
DOTNET_ADDITIONAL_DEPS=%InstallationLocation%/AdditionalDeps
DOTNET_SHARED_STORE=%Instal

steps.title: Added Dockerfile for building dotnet auto-instrumentation image.
steps.description: Added Dockerfile for building dotnet auto-instrumentation image.

steps.title: Added Github action for building and pushing the dotnet auto-instrumentation ...
steps.description: Added Github action for building and pushing the dotnet auto-instrumentation image.

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
DOTNET_ADDITIONAL_DEPS=%InstallationLocation%/AdditionalDeps
DOTNET_SHARED_STORE=%InstallationLocation%/store
DOTNET_STARTUP_HOOKS=%InstallationLocation%/netcoreapp3.1/OpenTelemetry.AutoInstrumentation.StartupHook.dll
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/pull/989. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
This PR is related with the PR [#976 ](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/pull/976).
This PR should be merged before  [#976 ](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/pull/976)

1. Added Dockerfile for building dotnet auto-instrumentation image.
2. Added Github action for building and pushing the dotnet auto-instrumentation image.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-operator installed or the issue environment reproducible.
